description: Local-first persistent memory MCP: shared SQLite key/value store, searchable, TTL-aware, secret-safe
name: io.github.davidmosiah/delx-memory

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to the SQLite store. Defaults to ~/.delx-memory/db.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: DELX_MEMORY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: HTTP host when transport=http. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.
environmentVariables.name: DELX_MEMORY_HOST

environmentVariables.description: HTTP port when transport=http. Defaults to 3030.
environmentVariables.name: DELX_MEMORY_PORT

environmentVariables.description: CORS allow-origin when transport=http. Defaults to http://HOST:PORT.
environmentVariables.name: DELX_MEMORY_ALLOWED_ORIGIN
